intent: Opt-in contract for ARMv7/ARM64 in-runtime debugger diagnostics that prefer bounded, freestanding, fail-safe behavior over hosted convenience layers.

modules.name: learn
modules.purpose: Collect target facts before mutation: CPU family, page size, cache line assumptions, syscall availability, and debugger capabilities.
modules.fail_safe: If any required fact is unknown, keep the target read-only and mark evidence as SKIPPED instead of PASS.

modules.name: setup
modules.purpose: Prepare deterministic fixed-size state, seed material, watchdog slots, and rollback journal capacity.
modules.fail_safe: If fixed capacity is exceeded, refuse activation rather than allocating dynamically.

modules.name: probe
modules.purpose: Inspect runtime state with branch-minimized hot paths and without changing target memory.
modules.fail_safe: On inconsistent reads or cache-miss amplification, downgrade to cold-path debugger sampling.

modules.name: patch
modules.purpose: Apply debugger/instrumentation changes only after journaling the previous bytes and metadata needed for rollback.
modules.fail_safe: Patch commit is all-or-nothing; incomplete journal or verification mismatch aborts before write.

modules.name: watchdog
modules.purpose: Observe heartbeat, trap density, syscall rate, and rollback deadlines from an isolated control path.
modules.fail_safe: If heartbeat expires, trigger rollback and disable further mutation for the epoch.

modules.name: failover
modules.purpose: Switch from active instrumentation to passive debugger observation when a guard trips.
modules.fail_safe: Failover never escalates privilege and never enables hosted/GC layers in a freestanding profile.

modules.name: rollback
modules.purpose: Restore original bytes, permissions, and debugger state using the journal created before mutation.
modules.fail_safe: If rollback verification fails, freeze further writes and emit explicit FAIL evidence.

modules.name: evidence
modules.purpose: Emit PASS/FAIL/SKIPPED facts for allocator, syscall, branch, cache, watchdog, failover, and rollback checks.
modules.fail_safe: Missing measurements are SKIPPED; contradictory measurements are FAIL.

forbidden_uses: cryptographic key generation without platform CSPRNG
security claims based only on geometric or quantum metaphors
